## 🚀 Getting Started

1. **Installation**: Install ImprovedTube via the [Chrome Web Store](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/improvedtube-for-youtube/bnomihfieicpkphgehignhfgjaecidih), [Firefox Add-ons](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/youtube-addon/), or the Safari App Store.
2. **Setup**: Once installed, click the ImprovedTube icon in your browser toolbar to open the settings panel.
3. **Customize**: Explore 250+ features across categories like Playback, Player, Appearance, and Shortcuts. Set your preferences once and enjoy a smarter YouTube experience.
